title: Vežba 74

fillInTheBlank.sentence: I'll BLANK to be quick so we can get BLANK to the main agenda.

blanks.feedback: Hii ina maana ya kufanya juhudi ya kufanya jambo fulani.
Hii hutumika kwa maana ya kurudi kwenye jambo lililokuwa linafanywa awali.

dialogue.text: I'll try to be quick so we can get back to the main agenda.

instructions: Slušajte audio i dovršite sledeću rečenicu.
explanation:
To try to do something ina maana ya kufanya juhudi kufanikisha au kumaliza jambo fulani. Kwa mfano:

I'll try to finish the task by the deadline. – Hii ina maana msemaji atajitahidi kumaliza kwa wakati.

To get back to something ina maana ya kurudi kwenye zoezi, mada, au shughuli baada ya kufanya jambo lingine. Kwa mfano:

Let's get back to the presentation after the break. – Hii ina maana ya kuendelea na maonyesho baada ya kuuyasimamisha kwa muda.
